title: EduVis Assessment Event
description: Telemetry event for tracking student attempts on assessment elements.

attempt_number.description: The 1-based attempt count for this student on this element.

answer_submitted.description: The raw option key or free-text response submitted by the student.

is_correct.description: Whether the student's answer was correct.

misconception_detected.description: Code representing the detected misconception, if any.

time_taken_seconds.description: Time spent by the student on this attempt in seconds.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of the event.
